reason: All FR-14 acceptance criteria are met: both Messenger and WhatsApp webhook endpoints registered with correct HMAC-SHA256 verification, hmac.compare_digest() used for timing-attack resistance, VERIFIERS dict contains both keys, route table registers both platforms, docstrings carry [FR-14] tag + SAD citations, and 13 tests cover valid/invalid signatures, response timing (<3s), missing headers, platform enums, and verifier registration.
